zh.lifeSummary: 當Adeline de Rollos於1092年9月2日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親Richard de Rollo33歲，母親Emma d'Envermeu21歲。她於大約1130年與Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1168年6月8日在英國英格蘭肯特托布利其享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adeline de Rollos于1092年9月2日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲Richard de Rollo33岁，母亲Emma d'Envermeu21岁。她于大约1130年与Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1168年6月8日在英国英格兰肯特托布利其享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rollos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rowles
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Oxfordshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Roll with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Rolfe .

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Adeline de Rollos was born on 2 September 1092, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Rollo, was 33 and her mother, Emma d'Envermeu, was 21. She married Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne about 1130. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 June 1168, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adeline de Rollos est née le 2 septembre 1092, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Rollo, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Emma d'Envermeu, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne environ 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1168, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adeline de Rollos am 2. September 1092 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Rollo 33 und ihre Mutter Emma d'Envermeu 21. Sie hat um 1130 Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Juni 1168 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Tonbridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Rollos è nata il il 2 settembre 1092 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Rollo, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Emma d'Envermeu, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne circa 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1168, nel Tonbridge, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeline de Rollosが1092年9月2日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Richard de Rolloは33歳，母Emma d'Envermeuは21歳であった。約1130年にBaldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1168年6月8日にイギリスイギリスケントトンブリッジで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline de Rollos(이)가 1092년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Rollo(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma d'Envermeu(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1130년 Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1168년 6월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 토브리지에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Bourne, Deeping, Lincolnshire, England: Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adeline de Rollos nasceu em 2 de setembro de 1092, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Rollo, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Emma d'Envermeu, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne aproximadamente 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de junho de 1168, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ro.Bourne, Deeping, Lincolnshire, England: Market Deeping, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adeline de Rollos родилась 2 сентября 1092 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Rollo было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Emma d'Envermeu, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne около 1130 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 июня 1168 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adeline de Rollos nació el 2 de septiembre de 1092, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Rollo, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Emma d'Envermeu, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Baldwin Fitz Gilbert de Clare lord of Bourne aproximadamente 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1168, en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
